entries.message: ✅ Spec / requirements artifact present — No committed spec file — judging against the PR description as the requirements/claim.
⚠️ Implementation plan artifact present — No implementation-plan artifact associated with this PR (none in its diff or description). Advisory only — adherence is not checked without one.

✅ Code adheres to the spec — The diff adheres to the SPEC: it replaces the UB-only boolean with AccessTransportTracker, records UB/TCP at the specified transfer decision points, fixes Get fallback recording after UB metadata resolution, and applies the MSet fallback buffer layout and payload offset fixes.
⏭️ Code follows the implementation plan — No plan artifact associated with this PR; adherence not applicable.
⚠️ Docs updated alongside code — Code changed (8 file(s)) but no documentation was updated.
✅ Tests updated alongside code — Tests updated alongside code (3 test file(s)).
